intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: This documentation site is your single source of truth for all project guidelines, whether you're an External Contributor (Submitter, Reviewer, Adjudicator) or part of the internal Snorkel/Mistral team.

reference/changelog.title: Changelog
reference/changelog.description: Track all updates, changes, and additions to the guidelines documentation.

reference/failure-modes/overview.title: Failure Modes Overview
reference/failure-modes/overview.description: Failure modes are specific, identifiable ways that AI systems can behave incorrectly or suboptimally. Understanding these patterns is essential for creating effective training data.

reference/faq-glossary.title: FAQ & Glossary
reference/faq-glossary.description: Quick answers to common questions and definitions of key terms.

reference/system-prompts/rules-and-patte.title: Rules and Patterns
reference/system-prompts/rules-and-patte.description: Best practices for creating effective system prompts that enable intended AI behaviors.

reference/system-prompts/templates.title: System Prompt Templates
reference/system-prompts/templates.description: Ready-to-use templates for common scenarios. Customize as needed for your specific intent.

reference/tools/common-bugs-and-glitches.title: Common Bugs and Glitches
reference/tools/common-bugs-and-glitches.description: Known issues, edge cases, and gotchas when working with tools in submissions.

reference/tools/news-search.title: news_search
reference/tools/news-search.description: Specialized search tool for finding recent news articles and current headlines.

reference/tools/open-search.title: open_search
reference/tools/open-search.description: Tool for searching and retrieving content from OpenSearch databases (structured internal data stores).

reference/tools/open-url.title: open_url
reference/tools/open-url.description: Tool for opening and reading content from a specific URL provided by the user.

reference/tools/overview.title: Tools Overview
reference/tools/overview.description: AI models in this project have access to external tools that extend their capabilities beyond their base knowledge. Understanding these tools is critical for creating effective submissions.

reference/tools/web-search.title: web_search
reference/tools/web-search.description: General-purpose web search tool for finding current information online.

reference/workflow/step-1-intent.title: Step 1: Intent
reference/workflow/step-1-intent.description: The intent is the foundation of your submission. It clearly states what the AI should accomplish and defines success criteria.

reference/workflow/step-2-system-prompt.title: Step 2: System Prompt
reference/workflow/step-2-system-prompt.description: The system prompt provides instructions and context that enable the AI to fulfill the intent. It's the AI's "operating manual" for this task.

reference/workflow/step-3-user-prompts.title: Step 3: User Prompts
reference/workflow/step-3-user-prompts.description: The user prompt is what a user would naturally ask or say to the AI. It should test whether the AI follows the system prompt and fulfills the intent.

reference/workflow/step-4-bad-response.title: Step 4: Bad Response
reference/workflow/step-4-bad-response.description: The bad response demonstrates a specific failure mode—a problematic AI behavior we want to teach the model to avoid.

reference/workflow/step-5-good-response.title: Step 5: Good Response
reference/workflow/step-5-good-response.description: The good response demonstrates the correct AI behavior—how the model should respond when following instructions properly.

reference/workflow/step-6-review-checkli.title: Step 6: Final Review Checklist
reference/workflow/step-6-review-checkli.description: Before submitting your work, complete this comprehensive review to catch common issues and ensure quality.

roles/adjudicator/common-edge-cases.title: Common Edge Cases
roles/adjudicator/common-edge-cases.description: Real-world examples of complex cases and how to handle them.

roles/adjudicator/tie-breaking-principle.title: Tie-Breaking Principles
roles/adjudicator/tie-breaking-principle.description: When faced with borderline cases or disagreements, use these principles to make consistent, defensible decisions.

roles/reviewer/common-edge-cases.title: Common Edge Cases
roles/reviewer/common-edge-cases.description: Navigate tricky situations with confidence. This guide covers the most common edge cases reviewers encounter and how to handle them.

roles/reviewer/how-to-write-feedback.title: How to Write Feedback
roles/reviewer/how-to-write-feedback.description: Great feedback helps submitters improve and maintains project quality. Learn how to write feedback that's clear, actionable, and constructive.

roles/reviewer/rubric-and-checklist.title: Rubric and Checklist
roles/reviewer/rubric-and-checklist.description: Use this rubric to evaluate every submission consistently.

roles/submitter/checklist.title: Submitter Checklist
roles/submitter/checklist.description: Use this checklist for every submission to ensure quality and consistency.

roles/submitter/common-mistakes.title: Common Mistakes
roles/submitter/common-mistakes.description: Learn from the most frequent errors to improve your submission quality.
